nasb.text: then he shall shave himself, but he shall not shave the scale; and the priest shall isolate the person with the scale seven more days.

esv.text: then he shall shave himself, but the itch he shall not shave; and the priest shall shut up the person with the itching disease for another seven days.

cnv.text: 那人就要剃去鬚髮，患癩痢的地方卻不可剃；祭司要把那患癩痢的人再隔離七天。

ccb.text: 那人要剃去头发和胡须，但不可剃患处的毛发。祭司要将他再隔离七天。
